claim: WHO World Report on Vision estimates 2.2 billion people with vision impairment, 1 billion preventable or unaddressed, cataract causing 50 percent of blindness in LMICs, and CSC below 50 percent in most low-income countries.
method: Reviewed WHO vision report chapters on burden, cataract, CSC, and workforce.
limitations: Vision-impairment estimates modeled from surveys of variable recency.
CSC estimates depend on RAAB surveys which are infrequent.
